name: Vilonia Golf Club
about: Vilonia Golf Club is a premium indoor golf venue in Vilonia, Arkansas, featuring state-of-the-art Garmin-powered simulators that allow year-round play on over 42,000 courses worldwide, including local Arkansas favorites. The facility offers flexible memberships with tiered plans, daily sessions at $35 per hour, and event hosting options for corporate groups, birthdays, and tournaments. With precise ball tracking technology and a focus on accuracy, the venue is designed for golfers of all skill levels seeking a realistic golf experience in an all-weather environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to 42,000+ courses including local Arkansas favorites
Flexible membership options for different skill levels
Food-friendly environment for events and casual play
Private bays available for Birdie and Eagle members

food_and_drink.notes: Food-friendly environment, snacks available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art simulators with precise ball tracking

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: We provide a full set of clubs, balls, and tees. You're welcome to bring your own clubs as well.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, we have a food-friendly environment. Snacks are available for purchase, and you can bring your own food. No alcohol is served on premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the exact time for 18 holes, but standard simulator sessions are 60 minutes for Par members and 90 minutes for Eagle members.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with regular events and a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all ages and skill levels.
